name: scores_processing_workflow
description: Workflow for processing scores entity that adds a timestamp and handles notifications if an event is triggered.

transitions.name: add_timestamp
transitions.description: Add processing timestamp to the entity.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity now includes a processing timestamp.

externalized_processors.name: process_add_timestamp
externalized_processors.description: Adds a processing timestamp to the entity.

transitions.name: handle_notification
transitions.description: Check if event is triggered and, if so, send a notification.

externalized_processors.name: process_check_event_triggered
externalized_processors.description: Checks whether the event has been triggered.

externalized_processors.name: process_send_score_notification
externalized_processors.description: Sends notification if an event is triggered.
